scores.correctness_notes: Comprehensive and accurate. Covers all required fields (name, type, base, platforms, summary, description, containers, resources), K8s-specific fields (assumes: k8s-api), and correctly notes the deprecated bases: vs current platforms: pattern. Includes the old bases: format as a note which matches gold standard. Extra detail on config types, relations, actions, charm-libs, charm-user all appears accurate.
